body: AC-014 uses testcontainers with real Postgres 16. Spec §12 says Postgres-compatible.
Spec §12 says production Postgres. Testcontainers is isolated. CI doesn't have Docker.
CI was updated in PR #41. Docker is available in CI now. See .forgejo/workflows/ci.yaml.
PR #41 only added Docker for the test job. The CI runner still lacks the docker socket. Testcontainers will fail.
The CI job uses the docker image with dind. It has the socket. See line 12 of ci.yaml.
dind requires privileged mode which the CI runner doesn't have. This will fail in production.

trace: Chimera arbiter: 2/3 models agree. Testcontainers qualifies as spec-compliant. dtoole's CI concern is valid but mitigated by dind configuration.
